refraction_layers_diagram: The image shows a refraction diagram with three labeled media, a light ray crossing two interfaces, dashed normals, and speed-order option cards.
The diagram shows a ray passing through three labeled media with normals at each interface and visible speed-order options.
This figure shows a three-medium refraction setup with a bent light ray and fastest-to-slowest option cards.
The visual shows three labeled media, a refracted ray, interface normals, and speed-order choices.
The image contains a refraction diagram with media M1, M2, and M3 plus visible order options.

single: Which option gives the order of light speed through M1, M2, and M3 from fastest to slowest?
Choose the option that orders the three media by light speed, fastest to slowest.
From the ray bending at the interfaces, which option lists the media from fastest light speed to slowest?
Which visible option is the fastest-to-slowest speed order for light in M1, M2, and M3?
Use the ray path and normals to select the option showing the light-speed order from fastest to slowest.
